template_ne: {party} lai Rs {amount} ko udhaar bikri entry. Dr {party}, Cr Sales. Kripaya confirm garnuhos.
template_en: Credit sale of Rs {amount} to {party}. Dr {party}, Cr Sales. Please confirm.

template_ne: Hajur, {party} lai Rs {amount} udhaar ma becheko record gareko chhu. Dr Debtors, Cr Sales. Thik chha?
template_en: Recorded credit sale of Rs {amount} to {party}. Dr Debtors, Cr Sales. Is that correct?

template_ne: {party} ko khata ma Rs {amount} udhaar bikri jodiyo. Debtor Debit, Sales Credit. Heri haalnu na.
template_en: Added credit sale of Rs {amount} to {party}'s account. Debtor Debit, Sales Credit. Please review.

template_ne: Udhaar bikri confirm: {party} - Rs {amount}. Entry: Dr {party}, Cr Sales. Ke yeso gardim?
template_en: Confirm credit sale: {party} - Rs {amount}. Entry: Dr {party}, Cr Sales. Shall I proceed?

template_ne: Samjhana: {party} lai Rs {amount} ko saamaan udhaar. Dr Debtors A/c, Cr Sales A/c. Confirm gardinuhos.
template_en: Reminder: Credit sale of Rs {amount} to {party}. Dr Debtors A/c, Cr Sales A/c. Please confirm.

template_ne: {party} lai {item} bikri Rs {amount} udhaar ma. Entry Dr {party}, Cr Sales. Tapaiko sahmati chahanchhu.
template_en: Credit sale of {item} to {party} for Rs {amount}. Entry Dr {party}, Cr Sales. I need your agreement.

template_ne: Mailye {party} ko udhaar bikri entry ready gare: Rs {amount}. Dr Debtors, Cr Sales. Post garau?
template_en: I have prepared the credit sale entry for {party}: Rs {amount}. Dr Debtors, Cr Sales. Shall I post it?

template_ne: {party} bata Rs {amount} ko nagad khridi entry. Dr Purchases, Cr Cash. Kripaya confirm garnuhos.
template_en: Cash purchase of Rs {amount} from {party}. Dr Purchases, Cr Cash. Please confirm.

template_ne: Nagad ma {party} bata saamaan kinidai chha Rs {amount} ko. Dr Purchase, Cr Cash. Thik chha?
template_en: Buying goods from {party} in cash for Rs {amount}. Dr Purchase, Cr Cash. Correct?

template_ne: {party} lai Rs {amount} nagad diye saamaan kharid. Entry: Dr Purchases A/c, Cr Cash A/c. Confirm gardinus.
template_en: Paid Rs {amount} cash to {party} for purchase. Entry: Dr Purchases A/c, Cr Cash A/c. Please confirm.

template_ne: Cash Purchase ready: {party} - Rs {amount}. Dr Purchase, Cr Cash. K gardim?
template_en: Cash Purchase ready: {party} - Rs {amount}. Dr Purchase, Cr Cash. What should I do?

template_ne: Mailye {party} bata nagad khridi entry banaye: Rs {amount}. Dr Purchases, Cr Cash. Review garnuhos.
template_en: I have created the cash purchase entry from {party}: Rs {amount}. Dr Purchases, Cr Cash. Please review.

template_ne: {item} ko lagi {party} lai Rs {amount} cash diyeko record. Dr Purchases, Cr Cash. Sahi chha?
template_en: Recorded paying Rs {amount} cash to {party} for {item}. Dr Purchases, Cr Cash. Is it correct?

template_ne: Hajur, nagad khridi entry: {party} - Rs {amount}. Purchases Debit, Cash Credit. Ok garnu hunchha?
template_en: Here, cash purchase entry: {party} - Rs {amount}. Purchases Debit, Cash Credit. Will you okay it?

template_ne: Hajurko prashna anusar, {concept} ko matlab {definition}. {explanation} Kripaya yaad garnuhos.
template_en: According to your question, {concept} means {definition}. {explanation} Please keep in mind.

template_ne: Lekhankan niyam anusar, {answer}. Tapain lai help chahiyeko ma khusi lagyo.
template_en: As per accounting rules, {answer}. Glad to help you with that.

template_ne: Sidha jawaf: {answer}. {reference} anusar yo sahi ho.
template_en: Straight answer: {answer}. This is correct as per {reference}.

template_ne: Tapaiko prashna: {question}? Mero bujhai ma, {answer}.
template_en: Your question: {question}? In my understanding, {answer}.

template_ne: Yas bare ma, {concept} lai bujhna {explanation}. Aasha chha spasta bhayo.
template_en: Regarding this, to understand {concept}, {explanation}. Hope that clarifies.

template_ne: Anumaanit jawaf: {answer}. Tapaiko khata sahikata yasai ma nirbhar hunchha.
template_en: Probable answer: {answer}. The accuracy of your account depends on this.

template_ne: Aajako din ma, {concept} ko bare ma tapainle sodhnu bhako {question}? Yo ho {answer}.
template_en: As of today, you asked about {concept}? This is {answer}.

template_ne: Yadi {concept} khojnu bhayeko, {answer} nai thik hunchha. Anyathaa kripaya spasta parnu.
template_en: If you are looking for {concept}, {answer} is correct. Otherwise please clarify.

template_ne: Lekhankan hisab kitab anusar, {answer}. Thap sahayog chahinchha?
template_en: According to the account books, {answer}. Need further assistance?

template_ne: Tapainko jigyasa ko samadhan: {answer}. Yo golden rule ma aadharit chha.
template_en: Solution to your query: {answer}. This is based on the golden rule.

template_ne: Kripaya rakam spasta parnu. Tapainle Rs {detected_amount} bhannu bhayeko ho? Anyathaa thik number lekhnus.
template_en: Please clarify the amount. Did you mean Rs {detected_amount}? Otherwise write the exact number.

template_ne: Maile rakam bujhna sakena. Kripaya thik amount Rs format ma dinuhos. Jastai: 5000
template_en: I could not understand the amount. Please provide the correct amount in Rs format. Example: 5000

template_ne: Amount confirm garau: {detected_amount}? Haina bhane kripaya sahi rakam bataunuhos.
template_en: Confirm amount: {detected_amount}? If not, please tell the correct amount.

template_ne: Sodh k cha? Tapainle lekhnu bhayeko amount {detected_amount} jasto lagyo. Sahi ho?
template_en: What's the query? The amount you wrote seems to be {detected_amount}. Is it correct?

template_ne: Entry ko lagi, rakam ra party dono chahinchha. Kripaya Rs ko thik hisab dinuhos.
template_en: For the entry, both amount and party are needed. Please provide the exact Rs figure.

template_ne: Maaf garnuhos, tapainko amount {detected_amount} ma kehi confusion chha. Saaf-saaf lekhidinus.
template_en: Sorry, there is some confusion in your amount {detected_amount}. Please write it clearly.

template_ne: Yadi tapainle {detected_amount} sochnu bhayeko thiyo bhane confirm garnus. Nahitra sahi number pathaunus.
template_en: If you were thinking {detected_amount} please confirm. Otherwise send the correct number.

template_ne: Hisab rakhna maado, rakam spasta hunai paryo. Kripaya Rs {detected_amount}? ke yeso ho?
template_en: To keep accounts, the amount must be clear. Please, is it Rs {detected_amount}?

template_ne: Kripaya party (vyakti ya company) ko naam spasta parnu. Tapainle {detected_party} bhannu bhayeko ho?
template_en: Please clarify the party (person or company) name. Did you mean {detected_party}?

template_ne: Maile party ko naam thahapayena. Kripaya sahi naam dinus. Tapainko entry adhuro chha.
template_en: I could not detect the party name. Please give the correct name. Your entry is incomplete.

template_ne: Party confirm gardinus: {detected_party}? Haina bhane kasko naam rakham?
template_en: Confirm the party: {detected_party}? If not, whose name should I put?

template_ne: Yas karyoko lagi sahi pakshya ko naam dinuhos. {detected_party} valid dekhina.
template_en: For this transaction, provide the correct party name. {detected_party} does not seem valid.

template_ne: Khata ma entry garna, debtor ya creditor ko naam chahiyo. Kripaya thik naam bataunu.
template_en: To enter in account, debtor or creditor name is needed. Please tell the correct name.

template_ne: Maaf garnus, tapainle bhaneko party {detected_party} ma kehi doubt chha. Ali spasta hunuhos.
template_en: Sorry, there is some doubt about the party {detected_party} you mentioned. Please be clearer.

template_ne: Kripaya {detected_party} ko full name ya ali detail dinus taki entry perfect hos.
template_en: Please give the full name or some detail of {detected_party} so the entry is perfect.

template_ne: Party ko naam bina debit/credit fix hudaina. Kripaya sahi pakshya bataunus. {detected_party}?
template_en: Debit/Credit cannot be fixed without the party name. Please tell the correct party. {detected_party}?

template_ne: Namaste! Hajurko hisab kitab assistant. Aaj ke help chahiyo?
template_en: Hello! Your accounting assistant here. How can I help today?

template_ne: Namaskar! Tapaiko khata sahik ra safa rakhna ma yahan chhu. Bhanidinus.
template_en: Greetings! I am here to keep your account accurate and clean. Tell me.

template_ne: Hajur, subha din. Hisab-kitab related jigyasa bhaye sodhna saknuhunchha.
template_en: Good day. You can ask any accounting-related queries.

template_ne: Namaste! Hisab kitab ready garna aadesh dinus. Udhaar, nagad, ya prasna.
template_en: Namaste! Command me to prepare accounts. Credit, Cash, or Query.

template_ne: Swagat chha! Tapaiko lekhankan saathi boliraheko chhu. Ke garna baki chha?
template_en: Welcome! Your accounting buddy is speaking. What's left to do?

template_ne: Namaste, sir/madam. Khata entry, query, ya clarification, j cha bhanidinus.
template_en: Hello, sir/madam. Please say what's there: account entry, query, or clarification.

template_ne: Jai Nepal! Hisab-kitab sambandhi madat chahiyeko ho? Ma tayar chhu.
template_en: Jai Nepal! Need help regarding accounts? I am ready.

template_ne: Lekhankan Assistant ma tapainko swagat chha. Thik hisab rakham sajilai.
template_en: Welcome to Accounting Assistant. Let's keep the correct accounts easily.

template_ne: Dhanyabad! Hisab kitab ma kehi aru sahayog chainchhe bhane bhannus.
template_en: Thank you! Let me know if you need any other help with the accounts.

template_ne: Swagat chha. Tapainko khata ramro hune kura ma khushi lagyo.
template_en: You are welcome. Glad that your account will be good.

template_ne: Dhanyabad! Ma sadhai hisab thik rakhna sahayog garna yahan chhu.
template_en: Thank you! I am always here to help keep the accounts correct.

template_ne: Tapainko dhanyabad le utsahit bhaye. Boli rakhnus.
template_en: Your thanks have encouraged me. Keep in touch.

template_ne: Khusi lagyo sahayog garna. Hisab milan ya naya entry ko lagi bhandai garnuhos.
template_en: Happy to help. Just say for reconciliation or a new entry.

template_ne: Hajurlai pani dhanyabad. Tapaiko hisab kitab sudridh garau.
template_en: Thank you too. Let's make your account books stronger.

template_ne: Dhanyabad ko patra! Ma yahi chhu jab pani hisab garne bela.
template_en: A token of thanks! I am here whenever it's time to do accounts.

template_ne: Aabhari chhu. Financial management ma thap sahayog linu hola.
template_en: Grateful. Please take more help in financial management.

template_ne: Maaf garnuhos, tyo bujhna sakina. Kripaya ali arkai tarikale lekhnus.
template_en: Sorry, I could not understand that. Please write it in a different way.

template_ne: Mero galti, maile tyo process garna sakina. Feripani ra entry detail sahita bhanidinus.
template_en: My mistake, I could not process that. Please say again with entry details.

template_ne: Hisab bigryo jasto lagyo. Maile tyo command liyena. Kripaya Udhaar ya Nagad shabda prayog garidinus.
template_en: Seems like the account is messed up. I did not get that command. Please use words like Credit or Cash.

template_ne: Trikuti bhayo. Maile bujheko chhaina. Kripaya paisa ra party ko naam firta lekhnus.
template_en: Error occurred. I did not understand. Please write the money and party name again.

template_ne: Maaf chahanchhu, tapainko prashna clear bhayena. Entry, Udhaar, Nagad ki Question?
template_en: I apologize, your question wasn't clear. Entry, Credit, Cash or Question?
